sections.sectionTitle: Na Nuntak Zia uh leh Na Gamtatnate uh Kipuah Un

verses.text: Topa in Jeremiah kiangah hih bangin thu gen hi
“ Topa' biakinn kongkhakpi kiangah ding in la, hih thuteng va taangko in: Topa a bia dingin kongkhak sunga hong tum Judah mite aw, Topa' kammal ngai dih un
Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hih bangin hong ci hi. Na nuntak zia uh leh na gamtatnate uh kipuah un. Tua hi leh hih munah kong tengsak bek ding hi
‘A muan'huai sungah i om hi. Hih pen Topa' biakinn ahi hi, Topa' biakinn ahi hi, Topa' biakinn ahi hi,’ a kicici zuauthute um kei un
“Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh na nuntak zia uh leh na gamtatnate uh na kipuah uh a, khatlekhat kikalah thuman leh thutakin na vaihawm uh a
namdang mite, pa neilote leh meigongte na nuaisiah kei uh a, hih munah mawhneilo mite that nawnloin, note' gimna ding mah ahi pasian dang peuh na biak nawn kei uh leh
tanglai-a na pu na pate un a neih tawntung dingun ka piak hih gamsungah ka hong tengsak ding hi
“En un, phattuamna a om hetlo zuauthu na um ta zen uh hi
Note in na gu-in, tual thatin, ang kawmin, a hilopi kiciamin, Baal kiangah meihal biakna pia-in, na theih ngeiloh uh pasian dangte delhin
tua ciangin ka min tawh a kilo hih biakinnsung ka mai-ah hong pai-in hong dingin, ‘Hong kihonkhiazo hi,’ na cih khit uh ciangin hih a muhthadahhuai nate khempeuh va hihkik zel ding na hi uh hiam
Ka min tawh a kilo hih biakinn no' ngaihsutna-ah misuam mi buluhte' bukna mun bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Keimah in note' hih khempeuh kong mu khin hi, Topa in kong ci hi
Ka min ka ten'sak masakna Shiloh khua-a biakinn-ah va pai un la ka mi Israel-te' gitlohna hangin ka nasepna va en dih un
Tu-in zong hih nate khempeuh na hih uh a, kong gengen hangin hong ngai tuanloin kong sapsap hangin hong dawnglo na hih manun Topa in kong cihin-ah
ka min tawh a kilo, note in na muan' uh hih Jerusalem biakinn leh note leh na pu na pate uh' kiangah kong piak hih mun pen Shiloh-a biakinn tungah ka hih bangin ka hih ding hi
Efraim' suanlekhak ahi leilu lama na behte khempeuh uh ka paihkhiat bangin note zong ka muhna panin kong paikhia ding hi.
“Jeremiah aw, hih mite-a' dingin thu ngetsak kei in. Amau-a' dingin kapin kei' tungah hong thumsak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nong thumna kong ngai kei ding hi
Judah gam khuapite sung leh Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah bang hih uh cih mulo na hi hiam

Naupangte in sing tomin, a pate un mei tawh uh a, nupite in a nusian uh vantung kumpinu-a' ding moh bawlna ding annel meek uh a, kei hong hehsakna dingun, pasian dangte' dawn dingin leenggahzu tawh biakna a pia tazen uh hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua hangin gimna a thuak, kei hi zenzen ka hi hiam? Hilo hi. Amau' zumna dingin amau mah in a thuak uh hizaw hilo ahi hiam

Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: En in, ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna hih munah ka bua ding a, mihingte' tung leh ganhingte' tung, lo lai-a singkungte leh leilaka singgahte tungah ka sung ding hi. Ka hehna mei bangin kuang ding a, kisumitlo ding hi.
“Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hih bangin kong ci hi: Mei tawh haltum ding na meihal biaknate uh hal nawnloin, sa nektheih biakpiaknate tawh kibangin ne vet un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin na pute na pate uh ka lakkhiat lai-in ka hopih kei a, meihal biakna pia ding leh biakpiakna a bawl dingin thu ka pia kei hi

Ahih hangin, ‘Ka thu hong mang un; tua hi leh note' Pasian ka hi ding a, note pen ka mite na hi ding uh hi. Note-a' dingin a hoihzawkna dingin na khempeuhah kong thupiak bang na zui un,’ ci-in thu ka pia zaw hi
Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong manglo uh a, a bil uh hong ngatlo uh hi. Amau' gitlohna lungsim uh zui-in amau' thuthu-in a omzaw uh a, mainawt loin a nungkin zaw uh hi
Na pu na pate uh Egypt gam panin a hong paikhiat ni uha kipan tuni ciangdong, ni khat khit ni khat, ka nasemte ahi kamsangte ka sawl tawntung a
ahih hangin amau in ka kamsangte' thu ngailoin, a bil uh hong ngatlo uh a, a lungsim uh a khauhsak uh hi. A pute a pate uh sangin a siazaw uh hi
“Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, hih thute amau kiangah na va gen ding a, ahih hangin amau in a hong ngai kei ding uh hi. Amaute na sap hangin a hong dawng kei ding uh hi
Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘Hih gam pen, Topa amaute' Pasian' thu a manglo gam hi a, thuhilhna sangloin, thuman om nawnlo a, thuman genin zong a nei nawn kei uh hi,’ na ci ding hi
“Jerusalem mite aw, na lu uh mettol un. Na sam uh paimang un la, mualtungah va kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih a gilo khang mite ka nialzo a, ka taisan khinzo hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh, Topa in kong cihin-ah, Judah mite in hoih ka sakloh nate a hih khinzo uh hi. Ka min tawh a kilo ka biakinn a nitsakna dingun a kihhuai milimte a koih uh hi
Hinnom Kuam-ah a tapate a tanute uh mei sungah a hallupna ding uh Tofeth a kici biakna tau khat a bawl uh hi. Tua pen kei' sawl lah hiloin, zong ka ngaihsunkha ngei beek kei hi

Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua mun pen Tofeth ahi zongin Hinnom Kuam ahi zongin a kicih nawnloh hun hong tung ding hi. Kithahna Kuam a kici zaw ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Tofeth munah mun awng a om nawnlo zah dongin misite a kivui ding hi
Misi luangte huih laka leeng vasate leh leitungah a om ganhingte' an a suak ding uh a, tuate a delhmang ding kuamah omlo ding hi

Tua ciangin Judah gam khuapite leh Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah gualnopna leh lungdamna awte leh zinei thakte leh mothakte' awte ka gingsak nawn kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua mun kinusia ding hi.
